description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a modern, minimalist exterior. The walls are primarily finished in a smooth, light-colored material, with large windows dominating one side, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The interior is visible through the windows, revealing a contemporary open-plan layout with a living area, dining space, and kitchen, as well as private rooms separated by interior walls. Decorative elements such as a floral accent wall and modern furnishings add character to the space. The main entrance is a simple door set into a plain facade, while the rear and side elevations are punctuated by additional windows and a back door. The overall design emphasizes functionality and openness, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist light-colored exterior. The open-plan interior is visible, featuring contemporary decor and functional living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door and a plain facade with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting large windows and a glimpse into the open-plan living and dining areas.
description_view_2: Rear view with decorative wall art, additional windows, and visible kitchen and living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showcasing a wall of windows, the living room, and interior furnishings.
